name: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W212/S212, C207/A207 (3.5L V6 petrol)

serviceNotes.engine oil: E 350 used M272 then M276 3.5L V6; Mercedes EU plans commonly 15,000 km or 12 months.
serviceNotes.dust filter: Dust filter per Mercedes EU maintenance booklet.
serviceNotes.engine air filter: Updated to 15,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (W212 2.0 petrol Tier 2 proxy for E 350 M272/M276).
serviceNotes.spark plugs: 60,000 km / 48 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (W212 petrol Tier 2 proxy).
serviceNotes.coolant: 150,000 km / 60 months (long-life coolant + 5-year time cap; auto-abc has no E 350 W212 interval table).
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: Later DI-related buildup possible; address if symptoms (depends on M272 vs M276 equipment).

serviceSources.engine oil: https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service — 15,000 km / 12 months (W212 2.0 petrol Tier 2 proxy for E 350 M272/M276)
serviceSources.dust filter: Cabin dust filter 30,000 km / 24 months — Mercedes-Benz W212; https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service
serviceSources.engine air filter: Changed from 60,000 km / 48 months to 15,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service
serviceSources.brake fluid: Brake fluid renewal every 24 months (time-based, DOT 4+); Mercedes-Benz passenger-car service manual — W212
serviceSources.check brake pad thickness: Brake pad thickness check ~30,000 km — Mercedes-Benz W212 inspection schedule (wear item; interval approximate)
serviceSources.spark plugs: 60,000 km / 48 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (W212 2.0 petrol Tier 2 proxy)
serviceSources.coolant: 150,000 km / 60 months: Mercedes long-life coolant for W212 V6 petrol (https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7610-2009/service has no interval table)
serviceSources.manual transmission oil: Manual gearbox oil ~100,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.transfer case oil: 4MATIC transfer case oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.front axle differential oil: 4MATIC front axle differential ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.rear axle differential oil: Rear differential oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.intake carbon clean: Direct-injection–related intake cleaning ~120,000 km when symptoms warrant — specialist practice
